steps.title: Use the circumference formula
steps.content: We know the circumference is $31\pi$ centimeters. We'll use the relationship between circumference and diameter.

steps.title: Solve for diameter
steps.content: Substituting into the formula: $$31\pi = \pi d$$ Divide both sides by $\pi$: $$d = 31$$ The diameter is 31 centimeters.
